tests.output_sample:
Show a runner's cross-event race history.

Use --provider to select the athlete-history provider (default: athlinks).
Supported providers: athlinks, nyrr.

Usage:
  running-race-results-pp-cli athlete [name] [flags]

Examples:
  running-race-results-pp-cli athlete "Sample Runner" --provider nyrr --json
  running-race-results-pp-cli athlete --racer-id 123456 --provider athlinks

Flags:
  -h, --help              help for athlete
      --json              output JSON
      --me                use the racer id from ATHLINKS_TOKEN (athlinks only)
      --provider string   athlete-history provider (athlinks|nyrr) (default "athlinks")
      --racer-id string   Racer id (skip name search)

tests.reason: command path [athlete] has fewer segments than placeholders (1)
command path [athlete] has fewer segments than placeholders (1)

tests.output_sample:
Resolve a race and return the result for a bib or name

Usage:
  running-race-results-pp-cli lookup [race-name] [bib] [flags]

Examples:
  running-race-results-pp-cli lookup "nyc marathon" 12345 --year 2024
  running-race-results-pp-cli lookup "brooklyn half" --name "Sample Runner" --json

Flags:
      --date string   race date YYYY-MM-DD (year is derived if --year unset)
  -h, --help          help for lookup
      --json          output JSON
      --name string   look up by runner name instead of bib
      --year int      race edition year

tests.reason: command path [lookup] has fewer segments than placeholders (2)
command path [lookup] has fewer segments than placeholders (2)

tests.output_sample: error: provide exactly one of <bib> or --name
